extraction_rules: STRICT ROOT: Every entity MUST have a path to the TIER 0 ROOT LegalEntity.
SPINE LINKS: Use HAS_MANAGEMENT, HAS_STRATEGY, HAS_SUPPLY_CHAIN, HAS_PRODUCTS, HAS_FINANCIALS, COMPETES_WITH, HAS_MARKET_INSIGHT, HAS_PRODUCT_PORTFOLIO, HAS_SERVICE_PORTFOLIO.
BRIDGE CONTAINERS: Group sibling entities under logical containers like Management, SupplyChain, ProductPortfolio, ServicePortfolio to avoid root-level clutter.
SERVICES vs PRODUCTS: Services (iCloud, apps) go to ServicePortfolio. Physical electronics (iPhone, Mac) go under ProductPortfolio.
GEOSPATIAL NESTING: Regions MUST use INCLUDES to point to Countries.
NO ORPHANS: Every node MUST lead back to the ROOT. Each node should have exactly one primary parent in the taxonomic spine.
FACT RECALL: Extract all mentioned Brands, Competitors, and Market Forecasts without exception.
EVIDENCE: Every relation MUST have verbatim source_text quote.
NUMERICS: Use JSON numbers for quant_data values.

extraction_examples.input: In January 2024, Nike Inc. announced it would expand manufacturing in Southeast Asia. CEO John Donahoe lead the deal.
extraction_examples.thought_process: Established Nike as TIER 0. Created 'Nike Management' container under Nike. Linked CEO John Donahoe to the Management node. Region nested under Strategy. All nodes trace to Nike via taxonomic links.

output_json.thought_process: Established Nike as TIER 0. Created 'Nike Management' container under Nike. Linked CEO John Donahoe to the Management node...

extraction_examples.ascii_tree:
[Company] Nike Inc.
 ├── HAS_MANAGEMENT → [Management] Nike Management
 │                       ├── HAS_MANAGEMENT → [Person] John Donahoe (CEO)
 │                       └── HAS_MANAGEMENT → [Person] Andy Campion (COO)
 │
 ├── HAS_PRODUCT_PORTFOLIO → [ProductPortfolio] Nike Products
 │                       ├── HAS_PRODUCTS → [ProductLine] Air Jordan
 │                       └── HAS_PRODUCTS → [ProductLine] Nike Air Max
 │
 ├── HAS_SUPPLY_CHAIN → [SupplyChain] Nike Supply Chain
 │                       ├── HAS_NETWORK → [ManufacturingNetwork] Vietnam Network
 │                       │                   └── LOCATED_IN → [Geography] Vietnam
 │                       └── HAS_NETWORK → [ManufacturingNetwork] Indonesia Network
 │                                           └── LOCATED_IN → [Geography] Indonesia
